description_long: This object is a rectangular, wall-mounted air conditioner with a sleek, modern design. The front face features a wide, horizontal grille at the top for air output, composed of closely spaced horizontal slats. The body is primarily light gray with a smooth, hard surface, and a small brand logo is visible on the lower right corner of the front panel. The right side houses a control panel with rotary knobs and a power cord extending from the back. The rear panel is darker, with mounting brackets and a coiled power cable, indicating it is designed for fixed installation. The overall construction suggests a metal and plastic exterior with internal components likely including metal coils and electrical parts.
description: A sleek, rectangular wall-mounted air conditioner with a horizontal front grille, side control knobs, and a visible power cord. The body is light gray with a smooth, hard finish and a small brand logo on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide horizontal grille, smooth panel, and brand logo at the lower right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the slim profile and a glimpse of the control knobs protruding from the opposite side.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing mounting brackets, a dark panel, and a coiled power cord attached to the back.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the control panel with rotary knobs and the power cord extending from the back.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, rectangular logo in dark text is present on the lower right corner of the front panel.
attribute_grille_pattern: The grille consists of closely spaced, horizontal slats running the width of the upper front panel.
attribute_control_panel_location: Right side, near the front edge.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Single wide horizontal vent at the top front, with louvered slats for directional airflow.
